members.name: BakeNavigationMesh
members.summary: Bakes the [NavigationMesh]. If [param on_thread] is set to [code]true[/code] (default), the baking is done on a separate thread. Baking on separate thread is useful because navigation baking is not a cheap operation. When it is completed, it automatically sets the new [NavigationMesh]. Please note that baking on separate thread may be very slow if geometry is parsed from meshes as async access to each mesh involves heavy synchronization. Also, please note that baking on a separate thread is automatically disabled on operating systems that cannot use threads (such as Web with threads disabled).

members.name: GetBounds
members.summary: Returns the axis-aligned bounding box for the region's transformed navigation mesh.

members.name: GetNavigationLayerValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member navigation_layers] bitmask is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetNavigationMap
members.summary: Returns the current navigation map [RID] used by this region.

members.name: GetRegionRid
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of this region on the [NavigationServer3D].

members.name: GetRid
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of this region on the [NavigationServer3D]. Combined with [method NavigationServer3D.map_get_closest_point_owner] can be used to identify the [NavigationRegion3D] closest to a point on the merged navigation map.

members.name: IsBaking
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] when the [NavigationMesh] is being baked on a background thread.

members.name: SetNavigationLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetNavigationLayerValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member navigation_layers] bitmask, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetNavigationMap
members.summary: Sets the [RID] of the navigation map this region should use. By default the region will automatically join the [World3D] default navigation map so this function is only required to override the default map.

members.name: Enabled
members.summary: Determines if the [NavigationRegion3D] is enabled or disabled.

members.name: EnterCost
members.summary: When pathfinding enters this region's navigation mesh from another regions navigation mesh the [member enter_cost] value is added to the path distance for determining the shortest path.

members.name: NavigationLayers
members.summary: A bitfield determining all navigation layers the region belongs to. These navigation layers can be checked upon when requesting a path with [method NavigationServer3D.map_get_path].

members.name: TravelCost
members.summary: When pathfinding moves inside this region's navigation mesh the traveled distances are multiplied with [member travel_cost] for determining the shortest path.

members.name: UseEdgeConnections
members.summary: If enabled the navigation region will use edge connections to connect with other navigation regions within proximity of the navigation map edge connection margin.

signals.name: BakeFinished
signals.summary: Notifies when the navigation mesh bake operation is completed.
